title: Trump's UFO Files: Ex-Pentagon Official Reveals What to Expect From Documents That May Soon Be Made Public
description: Christopher Mellon, a former senior Pentagon official, claims the files include a vast collection of extraordinary material, such as satellite imagery and previously withheld military videos that could reshape public perception of unidentified aerial phenomena. However, Mellon does not expect the release to confirm alien contact.

title: UFO Files: Donald Trump’s UFO Disclosure May Include Satellite Photos of ‘Non-Human’ Craft
description: US President Donald Trump is reportedly preparing to declassify a significant cache of sensitive government documents related to Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP), commonly known as UFOs. According to sources close to the administration, the release could include high-definition satellite imagery and cockpit videos of 'non-human' craft that exhibit flight characteristics beyond known terrestrial technology.

title: US holds satellite images of UFO craft ‘not made by humans,’ former Pentagon official claims
description: A former defense intelligence official claims the U.S. government possesses extensive UFO evidence, including satellite imagery of non-manmade craft. This comes as President Trump ordered the release of related files, though agencies are scrambling with no clear timeline. The expert anticipates some compelling data but doubts confirmation of alien contact.

title: Trump UFO files hold shock clues that prove we’re not alone & mystery craft not built by humans, says ex-US defence boss
description: TRUMP'S UFO files hold shocking clues that prove we are not alone, a former US defence chief says. Christopher Mellon says the federal government's shocking evidence of extraterrestrial activity includes satellite imagery of aircraft that look like nothing "we have built". Under President Donald Trump's order two weeks ago, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth will...

title: The former Cambridgeshire McDonald's people mistook for a UFO
description: The UFO-like building was a favourite for people to visit in the 1990s
